properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Now the darkness fades Into new beginnings As we lift our eyes to a hope beyond All creation waits With an expectation To declare the reign of the Lord our God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We will not be moved When the earth gives way For the risen One has overcome And for every fear There's an empty grave For the risen One has overcome

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now the silence breaks In the name of Jesus As the heavens cry let the earth respond All creation shouts With a voice of triumph To declare the reign of the Lord our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He shall reign forever Strongholds now surrender For the Lord our God has overcome Who can be against us? Jesus our Defender He is Lord and He has overcome He shall reign forever Strongholds now surrender For the Lord our God has overcome Who can be against us? Jesus our Defender He is Lord and He has overcome!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will not be moved When the earth gives way For the risen One has overcome (yes, he has) And for every fear There's an empty grave For the risen One has overcome We will not be moved When the earth gives way For the risen One has overcome And for every fear There's an empty grave For the risen One has overcome
